## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew assembleDebug` passes
- [ ] `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest` passes
- [ ] `./gradlew lintDebug` passes (or new warnings are explained)
- [ ] Follows the project's code style (`.editorconfig`) and architecture (MVVM + repositories)
- [ ] Fits Tempo's minimalism (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`); no new third-party dependencies without discussion
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under **Unreleased** if user-facing
